test_call.note: Verified Cold Caller works - SIP 500 bug was in Discovery Caller

notes.approach: SignalWire Native AI Agent + SWAIG Cloud Functions (DOE)

sip_500_root_cause.problem: Discovery Caller agent caused SIP 500 errors
sip_500_root_cause.cause: Invalid param 'openai_asr_engine' in agent config crashes SignalWire AI
sip_500_root_cause.solution: Use Cold Caller agent (no invalid params)

deprecated_agents.discovery_caller: e2c8a606-24ce-4392-a7a8-c11bd79a7a45 (SIP 500 bug - has invalid openai_asr_engine param)
deprecated_agents.reason: Use Cold Caller instead - verified working

known_issues: Calling API (/api/calling/calls) accepts 200 but calls never materialize
Compatibility API with external SWML URL fails (expects LaML XML not SWML JSON)
Fabric API resources are read-only at /api/fabric/resources/{id}, write via /api/fabric/resources/ai_agents
Rapid test calls trigger platform-level rate limiting (no SIP code, 0 duration)
SIP 500 can occur if agent has invalid params like 'openai_asr_engine'
Fabric AI agent /execute URLs return 404 when called externally - use Calling API with inline SWML instead

sip_500_fix.problem: SIP 500 errors when using Compatibility API with Fabric AI agent /execute URL
sip_500_fix.root_cause: The /api/fabric/resources/{id}/execute URL doesn't serve valid SWML when called externally
sip_500_fix.solution: Use Calling API (/api/calling/calls) with inline SWML instead of Compatibility API
